name: BEIERSDORF AG O.N.
summary: BEIERSDORF AG is a global company focused on personal care products with brands such as NIVEA, Eucerin, and Hansaplast; the company is headquartered in Hamburg, Germany. They develop, manufacture, and market a wide range of skincare, body care, and adhesive bandage products. Their business model centers on brand building, product innovation, and global distribution.
